mnemonics: In-Depth Display (I-D-D): Insert first, then Delete, then Display to see the result.
keyPoints: Insertion: Adds a new element to the data structure at a specified position.
Deletion: Removes an existing element from the data structure.
Display/Traversal: Visits and shows each element in the structure to view its contents.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to check if the data structure is empty before attempting a deletion, leading to errors.
Not updating the necessary pointers or links (in structures like linked lists) after an insert or delete operation, causing data loss or incorrect structure.
